fields.name: account_key
fields.title: Account Key
fields.description: Facebook long-lived access token for Service Account authentication

replication_config.title: Replication Configuration
replication_config.description: Settings for data replication from Facebook Marketing.

fields.name: account_ids
fields.title: Ad Account ID(s)
fields.description: The Facebook Ad account ID(s) to pull data from. The Ad account ID number is in the account dropdown menu or in your browser's address bar of your Meta Ads Manager.

custom_description:
Facebook Marketing API connector for managing ad campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives,
and accessing performance insights, pixel configuration, and event quality data.
This connector provides read access to Facebook Ads Manager data for analytics
and reporting purposes.
supported_questions:
- List all active campaigns in my ad account
- What ads are currently running in a recent campaign?
- List all ad creatives in my account
- What is the status of my campaigns?
- List all custom conversion events in my account
- Show me all ad images in my account
- What videos are available in my ad account?
- Create a new campaign called 'Summer Sale 2026' with traffic objective
- Pause my most recent campaign
- Create a new ad set with a $50 daily budget in my latest campaign
- Update the daily budget of my top performing ad set to $100
- Rename my most recent ad set to 'Holiday Promo'
- Create a new ad in my latest ad set
- Pause all ads in my most recent ad set
- List all pixels in my ad account
- Show me the event stats for my pixel
- What events is my Facebook pixel tracking?
- Search the Ad Library for political ads in the US
- Find ads about climate change in the Ad Library
- Show me Ad Library ads from a specific Facebook page
- Show me the ad sets with the highest daily budget
- Show me the performance insights for the last 7 days
- Which campaigns have the most spend this month?
- Show me ads with the highest click-through rate
unsupported_questions:
- Delete this ad creative
- Delete this campaign
- Delete this ad set
- Delete this ad

pixel_stats.description: Returns event quality and stats data for a Facebook pixel, including event counts, match quality scores, and deduplication metrics

parameters.name: ad_reached_countries
parameters.description: Search by ISO country code to return ads that reached specific countries. Use ALL to search all countries.

parameters.name: search_terms
parameters.description: The terms to search for. Blank space is treated as logical AND. Limit of 100 characters.

parameters.name: search_page_ids
parameters.description: Search for ads by specific Facebook Page IDs (comma-separated, up to 10)

parameters.name: ad_type
parameters.description: Filter by ad type category

parameters.name: ad_active_status
parameters.description: Filter by ad active status

parameters.name: ad_delivery_date_min
parameters.description: Search for ads delivered after this date (inclusive, YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: ad_delivery_date_max
parameters.description: Search for ads delivered before this date (inclusive, YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: bylines
parameters.description: Filter by paid-for-by disclaimer byline (JSON array of strings). Available only for POLITICAL_AND_ISSUE_ADS.

parameters.name: languages
parameters.description: Filter by language codes (ISO 639-1 JSON array, e.g. "['en','es']")

parameters.name: media_type
parameters.description: Filter by media type in the ad

parameters.name: publisher_platforms
parameters.description: Filter by Meta platform where the ad appeared (JSON array)

parameters.name: search_type
parameters.description: Type of search to use for search_terms

parameters.name: unmask_removed_content
parameters.description: Whether to reveal content removed for violating standards

ad_library.description: Search the Facebook Ad Library for ads about social issues, elections or politics, and ads delivered to the UK or EU. Returns archived ads matching the specified search criteria including ad creative content, delivery dates, spend ranges, and demographic reach data.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency used by the ad account
